findings.problem: The shared schema instruction for generated task artifacts still requires checkpoint steps to define a retry policy, but the repaired workflow contract has already moved that surface to caller-local runtime guardrails.
findings.evidence: `openspec/schemas/ai-enforced-workflow/schema.yaml:296-312` still says independent verification tasks must 'define routing target and retry policy'. The current task template instead requires caller-local guardrails and no longer names retry policy at `openspec/schemas/ai-enforced-workflow/templates/tasks.md:38-39`, and the repaired change-local task contract uses `caller-local runtime guardrails` at `openspec/changes/introduce-index-aware-verifier-workflow/tasks.md:109-113` and in checkpoint task bodies at `openspec/changes/introduce-index-aware-verifier-workflow/tasks.md:153-191`.
findings.recommendation: Align the task-generation instruction in `openspec/schemas/ai-enforced-workflow/schema.yaml` with the current shared contract by replacing the stale retry-policy wording with the caller-local runtime guardrails language used by the template and change-local tasks.

findings.problem: The refreshed repository-index interface card for `verification-sequence.md` still describes explicit rerun-comparison semantics for stable finding identifiers even though the current shared sequence no longer defines any such rerun-comparison contract.
findings.evidence: The refreshed card says the sequence 'rel[ies] on explicit rerun-comparison semantics for any stable finding identifiers' at `docs/repo-index/interfaces/openspec__schemas__ai-enforced-workflow__verification-sequence.md.yaml:12`, while also stating generic rerun-comparison inputs are no longer part of the contract at `docs/repo-index/interfaces/openspec__schemas__ai-enforced-workflow__verification-sequence.md.yaml:21`. In the actual shared sequence, the minimal bundle at `openspec/schemas/ai-enforced-workflow/verification-sequence.md:31-60` contains no rerun-comparison input, and the findings contract at `openspec/schemas/ai-enforced-workflow/verification-sequence.md:220-227` now enforces only per-array `id` uniqueness plus cross-field constraints.
findings.recommendation: Refresh `docs/repo-index/interfaces/openspec__schemas__ai-enforced-workflow__verification-sequence.md.yaml` so it mirrors the current session-oriented shared sequence without claiming rerun-comparison semantics that the source contract no longer defines.
